chapter_title: Acquisition of Pub. Interest in Private Rd. by Certain Counties
text:
For purposes of this chapter, adverse possession is not established by the:

(1) use of a private road by the public with the permission of the owner; or

(2) maintenance with public funds of a private road in which a public interest is not recorded.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 281. Acquisition of Pub. Interest in Private Rd. by Certain Counties
##### § 281.004 — Adverse Possession

For purposes of this chapter, adverse possession is not established by the:

    (1) use of a private road by the public with the permission of the owner; or

    (2) maintenance with public funds of a private road in which a public interest is not recorded.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: For purposes of this chapter, adverse possession is not established by the:
use of a private road by the public with the permission of the owner; or
maintenance with public funds of a private road in which a public interest is not recorded.
